title: Pipedrive vs Close CRM
description: Compare Pipedrive vs Close CRM in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Pipedrive emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, Close CRM is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like crm & sales capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, Pipedrive or Close CRM?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Pipedrive edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.3/5 for Close CRM. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. Pipedrive excels at Sales CRM helping teams visualize pipeline and close deals, while Close CRM is stronger for Built-in phone and email sales CRM for SMBs and startups.. Our team spent 26 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Pipedrive and Close CRM?
faqs.answer: Pipedrive and Close CRM differ in several key areas: pricing ($14–$99/user/mo vs $25-79/mo), target audience, and core feature focus. Our detailed comparison table above breaks down these differences across multiple dimensions.

faqs.question: Is Pipedrive better than Close CRM for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Pipedrive generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs. Our team spent 26 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Is Pipedrive cheaper than Close CRM?
faqs.answer: Pipedrive starts at $14–$99/user/mo while Close CRM starts at $25-79/mo. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, Pipedrive or Close CRM?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. Pipedrive integrates well with crm & sales tools, while Close CRM connects with crm & sales platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use Pipedrive and Close CRM together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Pipedrive or Close CRM?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. Pipedrive is known for its intuitive interface, while Close CRM offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise. Our team spent 26 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both.
